creator: sm@codenetworks.net
text:
this is with auto. which when loaded and interfaces come up, makes the kernel to panic.
==>  Building for intel-ixl-kmod-1.12.2
--- objwarn ---

--- if_ixl.ko ---
ld -m elf_x86_64_fbsd -d -warn-common --build-id=sha1 -T /usr/src/sys/conf/ldscript.kmod.amd64 -r -d  -o if_ixl.ko if_ixl.o ixl_pf_main.o ixl_pf_qmgr.o ixl_txrx.o ixl_pf_i2c.o i40e_osdep.o i40e_common.o i40e_nvm.o i40e_adminq.o i40e_lan_hmc.o i40e_hmc.o i40e_dcb.o freebsd_compat_common.o ixl_pf_iov.o ixl_iw.o

awk -f /usr/src/sys/conf/kmod_syms.awk if_ixl.ko  export_syms | xargs -J% objcopy % if_ixl.ko
objcopy --strip-debug if_ixl.ko
